---
title: "2026_05_lmerTest_&_lme4_testing"
author: "Stephanie Huang"
date: "2026-05-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# 2026_05_lmerTest\_&\_lme4_testing

This is after further reading of the the lmerTest paper (Kuznetsova et al., 2017) & lme4 (Bates 2015 + Winters 2013), And the MstatsTMT paper, MSstatsWeightedSummary, & new Msstats papers/theses.

Plus ANOVA WInters 2015 Tutorial + Ch 23 Linear Mixed models & associated links (Boynton, 2026 UW)

[**Purpose/Context**]{.underline} **⟶** This is to test and check outputs generated by the lme4 and lmer packages to compare to the results from MSstatsTMT and their implementation of it.

Contents

1.  Tutorial from ...

### Load Packages

```{r}
library(lme4) # original lmer() 
library(lmerTest) # used in MsstatsTMT groupComparisons (p-val, ANOVA(), summary()...)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
 
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
